---
title: "Markov Chain Lecture Notes"
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2026-02-08"
toc: true
title-block-banner: false
sidebar: markov-chain-notes
page-navigation: true
---

## Introduction

In these lecture notes we study stochastic processes.  In particular we study discrete time countable state processes that satisfy the Markov process, known as Markov Chains. 

> These notes closely follow the syllabus for the PSTAT160A Stochastic Processes course taught at the University of California Santa Barbara.

## Topic Summary

- Preliminary Material:
    - Fundamentals of Probability Theory
    - Generating Functions
- Markov Chains:
    - Markov Property
    - State Classification
